title: schmidtottia shaferi
intro: Schmidtottia shaferi, also known as Jamaican dogwood, is a flowering plant native to the Caribbean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include pain relief and anti-inflammatory effects, attributed to the presence of a compound called nuciferine. The plant's health benefits include relief from arthritis, muscle aches, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of Schmidtottia shaferi often involve the bark or leaves being made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
